title: ventilago leiocarpa
intro: Ventilago leiocarpa, also known as the Indian medlar or white malkangiri, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Ventilago leiocarpa include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and treat various skin conditions, such as wounds and eczema. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include making a decoction by boiling the leaves and bark in water, which can be used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and diarrhea.
